summary_en: 250,000 shares (2.43% of shares outstanding), ¥450M upper limit, open-market purchase via ToSTNeT on Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 25 – Jul 31, 2026. Authorized under Companies Act Article 459 and company bylaws to enable flexible capital-policy execution in response to future operating environment changes.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Regarding Own Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Cyber Security Cloud's board of directors resolved on 22 May 2026 to authorize the acquisition of up to 250,000 ordinary shares (2.43% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥450 million. Purchases will be executed via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under a discretionary trading agreement, with execution window from 25 May through 31 July 2026. The authorization is based on Companies Act Article 459 and company bylaws Article 44. The stated rationale is to enable flexible capital-policy execution in response to future changes in the operating environment. At the authorization date (21 May 2026), the company held 10,390,644 issued shares (excluding treasury) and 99,057 treasury shares.
